title: Generate Prisma Client in the Railway API image build
remote_validation_commands: Railway SSH new PrismaClient construction smoke check in the scoped API service
Scoped API GET /api/internal/db/status with an existing token supplied without printing it

forbidden_external_systems: production database outside the scoped API runtime

network_allowed_operations: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile using registry.npmjs.org only when the offline cache is insufficient
Railway remote Docker build/deploy for the scoped API service
Railway SSH and read-only scoped API endpoint checks
expected_remote_results: Railway remote Docker build uses Dockerfile.api successfully
Railway build logs show Prisma generate succeeds and the generated client is copied into the production dependency tree
new PrismaClient() constructs in the deployed API container without the initialize error
Only the scoped API service is redeployed
post_deploy_checks: /api/internal/db/status with token redacted from all output
expected_results: Workspace dependencies install without changing package or lock manifests
Railway remote Docker build using Dockerfile.api succeeds
Railway build logs show Prisma generate succeeds
new PrismaClient() constructs in the deployed API container without the initialize error
No migration runs and no database connection or mutation occurs
DATABASE_URL, Neon configuration, schema, migrations, dependencies, lockfiles, and deployment configuration remain unchanged
